title: Kuati Sector Forces
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Kuati Sector Forces''' were the [[Planetary Security Forces]] of the [[Kuat sector/Legends|Kuat sector]]. They had defended the region for centuries.<ref name="TFNCi">{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/jedicouncil/interview/saxton.asp|text=Face To Face With The Masters|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20250531175257}}</ref><ref name="AOTC:ICS">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref>

==History==
Among the vessels used in the sector defense fleets were the multi kilometer-long [[Procurator-class Star Battlecruiser|''Procurator''-class Star Battlecruisers]] and the [[Mandator-class Star Dreadnaught|''Mandator''-class Star Dreadnaughts]], forerunners of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warships used in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="AOTC:ICS" /><ref name="TFNCi" /><ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> The Kuat defense forces belonged to one of the few wealthy sectors that could afford fielding warships of this size prior to the Clone Wars.<ref name="TFNCi" /><ref name="Warfare" />

Following the [[Battle of Rendili]] during the Clone Wars, the sector fleets were made a part of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]], thanks to an effort by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to centralize all home defense fleets to help the war effort and prevent future incidents of the same kind.<ref name="SWR:TDOR">''[[Star Wars: Republic: Dreadnaughts of Rendili]]''</ref>
Upon the creation of the Galactic Empire, the defense fleets became part of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] as the [[Kuati Security Forces]] were Imperialized and augmented and Kuat received its own [[Moff/Legends|Moff]].<ref name="TFUCG">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], a fleet of Kuat vessels, led by the [[Kuat Drive Yards' corporate flagship|KDY flagship]] made a bombing run on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], as part of a cover-up orchestrated by [[Kuat of Kuat/Legends|Kuat of Kuat]].<ref name="TMA">''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]''</ref> Later on, as part of the same conflict, the [[KDY security cruiser]] was used to track the [[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']], appropriated by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], to the [[Oranessan system/Legends|Oranessan system]].<ref name="HM">''[[Hard Merchandise]]''</ref>

The sector forces defending the shipyards were defeated during the [[Taking of Kuat]]<ref name="Warfare" /> in [[8 ABY/Legends|8.5 ABY]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
